name: Volcano Simulator - Reunion Island
short_description: A unique and interactive lava simulator ! Interact in real-time with eruptions in photorealistic and dynamic environments. Create eruptions, control flow, pressure, temperature, and see the result in beautifully rendered 3D landscapes !
detailed_description:
Discover a unique and fully interactive lava simulator !
Watch eruptions and lava flows across the stunning landscapes of Réunion Island.
This simulation was co-created in 2016 with Eric Chahi, the renowned author of Another World, From Dust, and Paper Beast !

The simulator lets you interact in real time with eruptions in photorealistic, dynamic environments, revealing a wide range of volcanic structures, from lava fields to cones creation !
Create new eruptive fissures, control flow rate, temperature, pressure, and observe the evolution in beautifully rendered 3D landscapes !

The application is powered by a custom-built graphics and physics engine, specifically designed for this simulation and using the incredible computing power of GPUs !

Useful Keyboard Shortcuts
• Mouse, middle button : move the camera from the observer’s point of view
• Alt + middle button : rotate the camera
• C or double-click : center the camera on the selected point
• W : Wireframe view
• N : Normal map view
• Break : start / pause the simulation
• + / - : increase / decrease simulation speed
• Escape : open the main menu, with access to scenarios and graphic settings
• F12 : Steam screen capture
